context.goal: Build SwissBuildingOS V2 — a building intelligence platform for at-risk buildings. Core concept: buildings have evidence, diagnostics, actions, and portfolio views. Build the backend as a Node.js API with these modules: (1) Building registry — CRUD for buildings with address, type, year, risk_level (2) Evidence engine — attach documents/proofs to buildings with status (verified/pending/missing) (3) Diagnostic tracker — track building diagnostics (asbestos, energy, structure) with scores and recommendations (4) Action planner — generate and track remediation actions from diagnostics (5) Portfolio dashboard — aggregate stats across all buildings. Each module: store + validation + routes + tests. Wire all into a single HTTP server. This is a real product, not a demo.
constraints: create files in src/v2/ and test/v2/
context.rolling_summary: T1[codex]: I inspected the repository layout and confirmed there is no existing SwissBuildi; T2[claude]: DONE: Implemented the Building Registry module as the first SwissBuildingOS V2 s; T3[codex]: The repository already contains a `src/v2/` and `test/v2/` directory, and the la; T4[claude]: All 22 tests pass

recent_turns.summary: The repository already contains a `src/v2/` and `test/v2/` directory, and the last Claude turn claimed the Building Registry module is implemented, but this turn only allows planning/reviewing and I cannot verify the implementation contents from the available evidence alone. The next atomic step should be a review task for Claude to provide the exact Building Registry files and demonstrate they satisfy the module contract.
